betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Plasma Forge§f

§aThe essential forging machine for all endgame items — Gerald, DFC, ICF, and more!§f

The §bPlasma Forge§f is a machine used to forge the most advanced endgame items including §bGerald The Construction Android§f, §bDFC components§f, and §bICF laser parts§f. Some recipes require §bStellar Flux§f as an ingredient.

§6Construction§f:
The plasma forge is assembled in an assembly machine:
Recipe: Welded Cadmium Steel Plate×8 + Dense BSCCO Wire×32 + Cast Arsenic Bronze Plate×16 + Versatile Circuit Board×2
→ Assembly Factory → Plasma Forge

§6Operation§f:
§b• Requires §e10 MHE/t§f and §e1 MTU/t§f power
§b• Standard recipe duration: §e40 seconds§f
§b• Does NOT accept upgrades
§b• Can use §bFission Fragments§f and §bUnstable Isotopes§f for a §e×4 speed bonus§f

§6Items Forged§f:
§b• §bGerald The Construction Android§f — 600s, 1 GHE/s, 500 MTU/s
§b• §bDFC Components§f — all DFC parts require plasma forge
§b• §bICF Laser Parts§f — ICF fuel pellet maker and laser components
§b• §bICF Fuel Pellet Maker§f
§b• §bFEnSU§f — 300s, 1 GHE/t, 1 GTU/t
§b• §bEuphemium Compound Plates§f — cannot be stamped, must be forged here

§eTip§f: Stockpile fission fragments and unstable isotopes before using the plasma forge for long recipes. The ×4 speed bonus is essential for Gerald (600s → 150s) and FEnSU (300s → 75s). Route these materials automatically to the plasma forge for maximum efficiency!
